# WPShadow Milestone Calendar (2026-2027)

**Project:** WPShadow Core Plugin  
**Planning Period:** February 2026 - December 2027  
**Last Updated:** February 4, 2026  
**Maintained By:** [@thisismyurl](https://github.com/thisismyurl)

> **Vision:** Transform WordPress site management with educational diagnostics, automated treatments, and a helpful neighbor experience. This two-year roadmap balances feature development with our commitment to accessibility, learning inclusivity, and cultural respect.

---

## Release Schedule Overview

**Release Cadence:** Monthly releases on the last day of each month  
**Version Format:** `1.YDDD.HHMM` (Year digit + Julian day + Hour/Minute in Toronto time)  
**Total Releases:** 23 remaining in 2026 + 12 in 2027 = 35 releases

---

## 2026 Roadmap

### Q1 2026 (February - March)

#### **February 2026**
**Release:** 1.6059.HHMM (February 28, 2026)  
**Phase:** Phase 4 - Dashboard Excellence (Start)  
**Focus Areas:**
- Real-time gauge system implementation
- Improved dashboard UX and workflow visualization
- Activity logger enhancements
- Dashboard widget framework
- Kanban board improvements

**Key Deliverables:**
- ✅ New real-time gauge components (3)
- ✅ Enhanced dashboard performance metrics
- ✅ Improved workflow visualization
- ✅ Activity feed widget redesign
- ✅ Dashboard customization options

**Milestones:**
- Complete DRY refactoring from Phase 3.5
- Begin dashboard component library
- Implement first set of real-time gauges

---

#### **March 2026**
**Release:** 1.6090.HHMM (March 31, 2026)  
**Phase:** Phase 5 - Academy & Training (Start)  
**Focus Areas:**
- Knowledge Base integration framework
- Training video infrastructure
- Educational content system
- Learning path creation
- Multi-modal documentation

**Key Deliverables:**
- ✅ KB article integration (57 articles planned)
- ✅ Video embedding system
- ✅ Training course framework
- ✅ Learning path creator
- ✅ Interactive tutorial system

**Milestones:**
- Complete Phase 4 dashboard components (5 total)
- Launch Academy integration
- Begin video production for diagnostics

---

### Q2 2026 (April - June)

#### **April 2026**
**Release:** 1.6120.HHMM (April 30, 2026)  
**Phase:** Phase 6 - Privacy & Compliance (Start)  
**Focus Areas:**
- GDPR compliance framework
- Consent management system
- Privacy transparency features

- ✅ User data export/deletion

- ✅ Compliance audit system

**Milestones:**

- Begin GDPR compliance audit

---

---

#### **June 2026**
**Release:** 1.6181.HHMM (June 30, 2026)  
**Phase:** Phase 7 - Guardian Cloud (Start)  
**Focus Areas:**
- Cloud scanning infrastructure (MVP)
- Real-time monitoring system
- Cross-site dashboard foundation
- API framework
- Token-based authentication

**Key Deliverables:**
- ✅ Cloud scanning API (MVP)
- ✅ Multi-site dashboard (up to 3 sites free)
- ✅ Real-time monitoring hooks
- ✅ Token authentication system
- ✅ Cloud backup integration prep

**Milestones:**
- Complete Phase 6 compliance framework
- Launch Guardian Cloud MVP
- Begin token-based free tier

---

## Ongoing Initiatives (Throughout 2026-2027)

### **WPShadow Pro Modules**
**Cadence:** Continuous development  
**Focus:** Monthly releases with new diagnostic stubs and personas  
**Target:** Maintain feature parity between Free and Pro

**Key Modules:**
- WPShadow Pro Security
- WPShadow Pro Performance
- WPShadow Pro Backup
- Additional modules as needed

---

### **Bug Fixes & Maintenance**
**Cadence:** Continuous  
**SLA:** Same-week response to critical bugs  
**Target:** <24 hour response for security issues

**Priority Levels:**
- **Critical:** Security vulnerabilities, data loss, site crashes
- **High:** Major feature breakage, performance degradation
- **Medium:** Minor feature issues, UI bugs
- **Low:** Enhancement requests, non-critical improvements

---

### **Documentation & Knowledge Base**
**Cadence:** Continuous updates  
**Target:** 100% feature coverage (text + video)  
**Languages:** English primary, translations community-driven

**Coverage Goals:**
- Every diagnostic has KB article
- Every treatment has walkthrough
- Every feature has text + video documentation
- All documentation WCAG AA compliant

---

### **Accessibility Audits**
**Cadence:** Quarterly  
**Standard:** WCAG 2.1 AA compliance minimum  
**Target:** AAA compliance where possible

**Quarterly Reviews:**
- March 2026, June 2026, September 2026, December 2026
- March 2027, June 2027, September 2027, December 2027

---

### **Security Audits**
**Cadence:** Bi-annual (June & December)  
**Standard:** OWASP WordPress Security Guidelines  
**Target:** Zero critical vulnerabilities

**Audit Dates:**
- June 30, 2026
- December 31, 2026
- June 30, 2027
- December 31, 2027

---

### **Performance Benchmarks**
**Cadence:** Quarterly  
**Target:** <200ms diagnostic execution time  
**Measurement:** Against 10 reference sites

**Benchmark Dates:**
- March 31, 2026, June 30, 2026, September 30, 2026, December 31, 2026
- March 31, 2027, June 30, 2027, September 30, 2027, December 31, 2027

---

## Success Metrics & KPIs

### **Product Metrics**

| Metric | 2026 Target | 2027 Target |
|--------|-------------|-------------|
| Active Installations | 10,000 | 50,000 |
| Monthly Active Users | 5,000 | 25,000 |
| User Retention Rate | 60% | 75% |
| Average Session Time | 10 min | 15 min |
| Feature Adoption Rate | 40% | 60% |

### **Quality Metrics**

| Metric | 2026 Target | 2027 Target |
|--------|-------------|-------------|
| WCAG AA Compliance | 100% | 100% (AAA push) |
| Security Issues (Critical) | 0 | 0 |
| Average Response Time | <24 hours | <12 hours |
| Code Coverage | 80% | 90% |
| User Satisfaction (NPS) | 50+ | 70+ |

### **Community Metrics**

| Metric | 2026 Target | 2027 Target |
|--------|-------------|-------------|
| GitHub Stars | 500 | 2,000 |
| Community Contributors | 20 | 100 |
| KB Articles | 200 | 500 |
| Video Tutorials | 100 | 300 |
| Active Forum Members | 1,000 | 5,000 |

### **Business Metrics**

| Metric | 2026 Target | 2027 Target |
|--------|-------------|-------------|
| Pro Subscriptions | 200 | 1,000 |
| Cloud Users (Free) | 1,000 | 5,000 |
| Cloud Users (Paid) | 100 | 500 |
| Revenue (MRR) | $10K | $50K |
| Customer LTV | $500 | $1,000 |

---

## Alignment with Core Philosophy

Every milestone and release must embody:

### **The 12 Commandments**
1. ✅ Helpful Neighbor Experience
2. ✅ Free as Possible
3. ✅ Register, Don't Pay
4. ✅ Advice, Not Sales
5. ✅ Drive to Knowledge Base
6. ✅ Drive to Free Training
7. ✅ Ridiculously Good for Free
8. ✅ Inspire Confidence
9. ✅ Everything Has a KPI
10. ✅ Beyond Pure (Privacy First)
11. ✅ Talk-About-Worthy
12. ✅ Expandable

### **The 3 CANON Pillars**
- 🌍 **Accessibility First:** No feature complete until accessible
- 🎓 **Learning Inclusive:** Support all learning styles
- 🌐 **Culturally Respectful:** Design for global communities

---

## Risk Mitigation

### **Technical Risks**

| Risk | Impact | Mitigation | Timeline |
|------|--------|------------|----------|
| Performance degradation | High | Quarterly benchmarks | Ongoing |
| Security vulnerabilities | Critical | Bi-annual audits | June/Dec |
| Breaking changes (WP Core) | High | Beta testing program | Pre-release |
| API rate limiting | Medium | Caching strategy | Q2 2026 |
| Cloud infrastructure costs | Medium | Usage monitoring | Q3 2026 |

### **Business Risks**

| Risk | Impact | Mitigation | Timeline |
|------|--------|------------|----------|
| Low adoption rate | High | Marketing campaign | Q1 2026 |
| High churn rate | High | User feedback loops | Ongoing |
| Competitor feature parity | Medium | Innovation focus | Ongoing |
| Revenue shortfall | Medium | Diversify revenue streams | Q2 2026 |
| Community growth stagnation | Medium | Ambassador program | Q4 2027 |

### **Resource Risks**

| Risk | Impact | Mitigation | Timeline |
|------|--------|------------|----------|
| Developer availability | High | Community contributions | Q3 2027 |
| Documentation lag | Medium | Automated docs | Q2 2026 |
| Support overwhelm | Medium | Tiered support system | Q3 2026 |
| Translation bottleneck | Low | Community platform | Q4 2027 |
| Infrastructure scaling | Medium | Auto-scaling setup | Q2 2026 |

---

## Communication & Transparency

### **Public Updates**
- **Monthly:** Release notes and feature announcements
- **Quarterly:** Roadmap reviews and progress reports
- **Bi-annual:** Community surveys and feedback sessions
- **Annual:** Year in review and strategic direction

### **Community Engagement**
- **Weekly:** Community forum check-ins
- **Monthly:** Community calls and Q&A sessions
- **Quarterly:** Developer office hours
- **Annual:** Virtual summit/conference

### **Channels**
- GitHub Discussions (primary)
- WordPress.org forums
- Twitter/X (@wpshadow)
- YouTube (WPShadow Academy)
- Blog (wpshadow.com/blog)
